lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਛੋਡੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਹੋਈਐ ਸਭ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: meraa teraa chhoddeeai bhaaee hoeeai sabh kee dhoor |
lines.english: Give up your sense of mine and yours, O Siblings of Destiny, and become the dust of the feet of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਸਾਰਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਪੇਖੈ ਸੁਣੈ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt braham pasaariaa bhaaee pekhai sunai hajoor |
lines.english: In each and every heart, God is contained, O Siblings of Destiny; He sees, and hears, and is ever-present with us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਭਾਈ ਤਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਮਰੀਐ ਝੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jit din visarai paarabraham bhaaee tith din mareeai jhoor |
lines.english: On that day when one forgets the Supreme Lord God, O Siblings of Destiny, on that day, one ought to die crying out in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: prem padaarath naam hai bhaaee maaeaa moh binaas |
lines.english: The Love of the Name is the greatest treasure, O Siblings of Destiny; through it, emotional attachment to Maya is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਕਰਾਵਨ ਸਮਰਥੋ ਭਾਈ ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: karan karaavan samaratho bhaaee sarab kalaa bharapoor |4|
lines.english: He is the all-powerful Cause of Causes, O Siblings of Destiny; he is totally filled with all powers. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਏ ਭਾਈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis bhaavai taa mel le bhaaee hiradai naam nivaas |
lines.english: If it is pleasing to His Will, then He unites us in His Union, O Siblings of Destiny; the Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to abide in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਰਿਦੈ ਹੋਵੈ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh kamal pragaaseeai bhaaee ridai hovai paragaas |
lines.english: The heart-lotus of the Gurmukh blossoms forth, O Siblings of Destiny, and the heart is illumined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਭਇਆ ਪਰਤਾਪੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਈ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਧਰਤਿ ਅਕਾਸੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: pragatt bheaa parataap prabh bhaaee mauliaa dharat akaas |5|
lines.english: The Glory of God has been revealed, O Siblings of Destiny, and the earth and sky have blossomed forth. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਸੰਤੋਖਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai santokhiaa bhaaee ahinis laagaa bhaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has blessed me with contentment, O Siblings of Destiny; day and night, I remain attached to the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karanee sun sun jeeviaa bhaaee nihachal paaeaa thaau |
lines.english: Listening with my ears, I hear and so I live, O Siblings of Destiny; I have obtained the unchanging, unmoving state.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਵੈ ਸਦਾ ਭਾਈ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਦੁ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa raam ravai sadaa bhaaee saachaa saad suaau |
lines.english: My tongue continually chants the Lord's Name, O Siblings of Destiny; this is the true taste, and the object of human life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਭਾਈ ਸੋ ਜੀਅੜਾ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jis parateet na aavee bhaaee so jeearraa jal jaau |6|
lines.english: That soul,which does not place its faith in the Lord shall burn, O Siblings of Destiny. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬੈ ਭਾਈ ਹਉ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bahu gun mere saahibai bhaaee hau tis kai bal jaau |
lines.english: My Lord and Master has so many virtues, O Siblings of Destiny; I am a sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਨਿਰਗੁਣੀਆਰੇ ਪਾਲਦਾ ਭਾਈ ਦੇਇ ਨਿਥਾਵੇ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ohu niraguneeaare paaladaa bhaaee dee nithaave thaau |
lines.english: He nurtures even the most worthless, O Siblings of Destiny, and gives home to the homeless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਪੂਰਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਰਮਾਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jis gur saachaa bhetteeai bhaaee pooraa tis karamaau |7|
lines.english: One who meets with the True Guru, O Siblings of Destiny, does so only by perfect destiny. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸੰਬਾਹੇ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਭਾਈ ਗੂੜਾ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rijak sanbaahe saas saas bhaaee goorraa jaa kaa naau |
lines.english: He gives us nourishment with each and every breath, O Siblings of Destiny; His Name is everlasting.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਜੀਵੀਐ ਭਾਈ ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin gharree na jeeveeai bhaaee sarab kalaa bharapoor |
lines.english: Without Him, I cannot live, even for an instant, O Siblings of Destiny; He is totally filled with all powers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਗਿਰਾਸਿ ਨ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਭਾਈ ਪੇਖਉ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saas giraas na visarai bhaaee pekhau sadaa hajoor |
lines.english: With every breath and morsel of food, I will not forget Him, O Siblings of Destiny; I behold Him ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਲਗੀਆ ਭਾਈ ਸੇ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਮਰਦੇ ਝੂਰਿ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jinaa preet na lageea bhaaee se nit nit marade jhoor |8|
lines.english: Those who do not embrace love for the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny, always die crying out in pain. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਸਰਬ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sang milaaeaa bhaaee sarab rahiaa bharapoor |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I meet Him, O Siblings of Destiny; He is totally pervading and permeating everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਆ ਭਾਈ ਕੀਤੋਨੁ ਅੰਗੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa nadar nihaaliaa bhaaee keeton ang apaar |
lines.english: By His Glance of Grace, He has blessed us, O Siblings of Destiny; He shall be with us until the very end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਚਲਿ ਲਾਇ ਤਰਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: anchal laae taraaeaa bhaaee bhaujal dukh sansaar |
lines.english: Grasping hold of the hem of His robe, O Siblings of Destiny, we are carried across the world-ocean of fear and pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੋਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal hoeaa bhaaee bhojan naam adhaar |
lines.english: My mind and body are soothed and calmed, O Siblings of Destiny, nourished by the food of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਭਾਈ ਜਿ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਾਟਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੯॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tis saranaagatee bhaaee ji kilabikh kaattanahaar |9|1|
lines.english: Nanak has entered His Sanctuary, O Siblings of Destiny; the Lord is the Destroyer of sins. ||9||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਗਰਭ ਦੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੋ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਹ ਅਪਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maat garabh dukh saagaro piaare teh apanaa naam japaaeaa |
lines.english: The womb of the mother is an ocean of pain, O Beloved; even there, the Lord causes His Name to be chanted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਾਢਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਪਸਰੀਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: baahar kaadt bikh pasareea piaare maaeaa mohu vadhaaeaa |
lines.english: When he emerges, he finds corruption pervading everywhere, O Beloved, and he becomes increasingly attached to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਆਰਾਧੇ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so aaraadhe saas saas piaare raam naam liv laaeaa |1|
lines.english: He worships the Lord in adoration with each and every breath, O Beloved; he is lovingly attached to the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕੀਤੋ ਕਰਮੁ ਆਪਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis no keeto karam aap piaare tis pooraa guroo milaaeaa |
lines.english: One whom the Lord blesses with His kind favor, O Beloved, meets the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: man tan teree ttek hai piaare man tan teree ttek |
lines.english: You are the support of my mind and body, O Beloved; You are the support of my mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕਰਨਹਾਰੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਏਕ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bin avar na karanahaar piaare antarajaamee ek | rahaau |
lines.english: There is no other Creator except for You, O Beloved; You alone are the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਆਇਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਅਨਿਕ ਜੋਨਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kott janam bhram aaeaa piaare anik jon dukh paae |
lines.english: After wandering in doubt for millions of incarnations, he comes into the world, O Beloved; for uncounted lifetimes, he has suffered in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਬਹੁਤੀ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa saahib visariaa piaare bahutee milai sajaae |
lines.english: He has forgotten his True Lord and Master, O Beloved, and so he suffers terrible punishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਭੇਟੈ ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸੇ ਲਾਗੇ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin bhettai pooraa satiguroo piaare se laage saachai naae |
lines.english: Those who meet with the Perfect True Guru, O Beloved, are attached to the True Name.
